generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who cares about national security, I'm really concerned about how our civil defense preparedness funds are being wasted on bloated bureaucracies. Did you hear about the $2.3 million emergency shelter project in Ohio that got canceled after 3 years of planning because the local agency couldn't coordinate with FEMA? We need to make sure our tax dollars are actually going to protect communities, not just feed bureaucratic inefficiencies. #CivilDefense #NationalSecurity
